justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's request for "next Friday" and "around 9 AM" by finding an available slot on Friday, May 29th, from 09:00 to 10:00.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information in the first turn and successfully booked the appointment in the second turn without any unnecessary exchanges.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the request and confirming the booking in a clear and friendly manner.
